author: Dylan Barker
title: Cover art for music
content: Would anyone here be willing to make cover art? I’m tight on funds but we can work something out forsure, credit will be given and I’ll share the artwork on all my platforms multiple times! Just reach out if you’re interested:) thank you!

author: KawaiiCapy
title: OC commissions for LADS style
content: Looking for someone to draw: OC x Caleb (Yandere), Friend OC x Sylus, My friend and I’s OCs. MOP: Gcash/Paypal/Kofi/Vgen Budget: Flexible

author: Michael Charles
title: Trippy horror music video
content: Hello! I am looking for someone who can make me a trippy/horrorish vibe music video in an analog or VHS style... My budget is 300
